'''âs-k-w-d''' ('''kasakwedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charcoalify|charcoalify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charcoalify|charcoalify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-k-w-d
|-
! Lemma
| kasakwedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisakwedoko|thisakwedoko]] || [[word:jisakwedoko|jisakwedoko]] || [[word:shisakwedoko|shisakwedoko]] || [[word:kisakwedoko|kisakwedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusakwedoko|thuthusakwedoko]] || [[word:jujusakwedoko|jujusakwedoko]] || [[word:shushusakwedoko|shushusakwedoko]] || [[word:kukusakwedoko|kukusakwedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusakwedoko|thusakwedoko]] || [[word:jusakwedoko|jusakwedoko]] || [[word:shusakwedoko|shusakwedoko]] || [[word:kusakwedoko|kusakwedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusakwedoko|thusakwedoko]] || [[word:jusakwedoko|jusakwedoko]] || [[word:shusakwedoko|shusakwedoko]] || [[word:kusakwedoko|kusakwedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesakwedoko|thesakwedoko]] || [[word:jesakwedoko|jesakwedoko]] || [[word:shesakwedoko|shesakwedoko]] || [[word:kesakwedoko|kesakwedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosakwedoko|thothosakwedoko]] || [[word:jojosakwedoko|jojosakwedoko]] || [[word:shoshosakwedoko|shoshosakwedoko]] || [[word:kokosakwedoko|kokosakwedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosakwedoko|thosakwedoko]] || [[word:josakwedoko|josakwedoko]] || [[word:shosakwedoko|shosakwedoko]] || [[word:kosakwedoko|kosakwedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosakwedoko|thosakwedoko]] || [[word:josakwedoko|josakwedoko]] || [[word:shosakwedoko|shosakwedoko]] || [[word:kosakwedoko|kosakwedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsakwedoko|thĂŠsakwedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠsakwedoko|jĂŠsakwedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠsakwedoko|shĂŠsakwedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠsakwedoko|kĂŠsakwedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasakwedoko|thathasakwedoko]] || [[word:jajasakwedoko|jajasakwedoko]] || [[word:shashasakwedoko|shashasakwedoko]] || [[word:kakasakwedoko|kakasakwedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasakwedoko|thasakwedoko]] || [[word:jasakwedoko|jasakwedoko]] || [[word:shasakwedoko|shasakwedoko]] || [[word:kasakwedoko|kasakwedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasakwedoko|thasakwedoko]] || [[word:jasakwedoko|jasakwedoko]] || [[word:shasakwedoko|shasakwedoko]] || [[word:kasakwedoko|kasakwedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
